title: NUPTIO Easter Decorations Mini Clear Glass Hanging Angels Christmas Tree Ornaments, Christmas Season Holiday Decorations Hanging Ornaments Glass Art Prayer Guardian for Children Teens Loved Ones
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: 12 Pcs mini sized hanging angel ornaments and 12 pcs golden cords for hanging( each string measures 7.87 inches/ 20cm length). Each angel measure 0.95 inches W x 1.8 inches H.(2.4cm W x 4.6cm H). Perfect size and weight for any Christmas tree.

STAND & HANG: Decorate with a designer accent add to your Christmas tree, window, garlands, and wreaths for a sophisticated display. It can also stand on their own on a tabletop, favors/placecard holders on your holiday table or just a pretty angel knick-knacks on shelves or mantle pieces.
TIMELESS STYLE: Each ornament features a clear angel in a dress, in a praying pose. Designed to match any style of decoration and with an elegance that you can only find in simplicity

GREAT GIFTS: Our angels decorations comes with an inspirational message of prayer and faith, making a great gift item for your family and friends. If you are looking for a beautiful gift for a loved one, this glass art ornament will do the job fantastically.
MATERIAL: Made of high borosilicate heat resistant glass. Strong and durable, water-saving, drought- resistant, pervious to light, not easy deformation, corrosion resistance.
